title: tragus racemosus
intro: Tragus racemosus, also known as Chirata or Kalmegh, is a perennial herb belonging to the family Aperaceae. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and treating respiratory problems like bronchitis and asthma. Tragus racemosus can be prepared as a decoction, powder, or oil, and is often used in herbal remedies, either on its own or in combination with other herbs, to harness its medicinal properties.
